overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval village at sunset, passing through a wooden palisade gate and crossing a long wooden bridge into a marshy wilderness. The scene features warm golden hour lighting, thatched-roof huts, and transitions from enclosed village streets to open natural landscapes.

traditional medieval hut with straw roof and wooden frame

simple wooden post fence lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow medieval village street lined with traditional thatched-roof huts on both sides. The warm golden hour sun casts long shadows across the muddy dirt path. A villager stands near a wooden cart on the right, and wooden fences line the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden gate tunnel through palisade wall

events.description: approaching and entering the large wooden gate structure at the village edge
entering the shadow of the gate tunnel, lighting becomes darker and more muted

agents.ego_description: walking through the wooden gate tunnel, transitioning from village to wilderness

entered.detail: large wooden archway with heavy timber beams and rope supports
tall wooden stake fence forming the village boundary wall
tall wooden stake fence forming the village boundary wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through a large wooden gate structure that marks the edge of the village. The environment transitions from open village street to a covered tunnel-like gate with wooden palisade walls on both sides. The lighting shifts to darker, muted tones as the character enters the shadow of the gate structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: long wooden bridge over marsh water

events.description: exiting the gate onto a long wooden bridge spanning marsh water

agents.ego_description: walking across the wooden bridge, looking out over the marsh water on both sides

entered.detail: long wooden plank bridge with weathered boards and simple railings
rough wooden post and rail fence along the bridge edge
rough wooden post and rail fence along the bridge edge
calm water with reeds and marsh vegetation visible below the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the gate onto a long wooden bridge that stretches across a marshy waterway. The bridge has simple wooden railings on both sides, and marsh water is visible below. The sun sets in the background, casting a warm orange glow over the distant forest and mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: marshland path with scattered trees and evening mist

events.description: exiting the bridge onto a dirt path in the open marsh wilderness

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path through the marsh, passing a guard standing watch

notable_agents.action: guard standing with a spear, watching the path

entered.detail: leafless and sparse trees with reddish bark lining the marsh path
leafless and sparse trees with reddish bark lining the marsh path
narrow dirt trail winding through tall grass and marsh vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the bridge and enters an open marshland area with a narrow dirt path winding through tall grass. Sparse trees with reddish bark line both sides of the path, and evening mist gathers in the distance. A guard stands watch on the right side of the path holding a spear, near a small camp fire.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed streets of a medieval village into an expansive, misty marshland at sunset. It begins by following the character down a narrow muddy path lined with thatched-roof huts and wooden fences under the long shadows of the golden hour. As the character reaches the village edge, the scene shifts into the muted shadows of a covered wooden palisade gate, creating a brief tunnel of darkness. The camera then emerges from the gate onto a long wooden bridge stretching over a waterway, where the lighting opens up into a warm orange glow against a backdrop of distant mountains. Finally, the path leads off the bridge and into an open wilderness of tall grass and reddish trees, where evening mist gathers around a lone guard standing by a small campfire.
